allow: Bash(for f in archive check_setup.py config.yaml executive_summary.db command_center.db src doc2sales.docx dashboard_startup.log)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Align database with RetentionPro data dictionary for Miles

- Customer: Replace name with first_name/last_name, add address fields,
  unsubscribe flags \(compliance\), visit_count, average_spending
- Vehicle: Add current_mileage, inspection_date
- Campaign: Add message_body, message_subject, trigger config fields
- Appointment: Add technician, service_writer, confirmed, waiter, loaner

Update demo data generation for all new fields including realistic
PA/NY/NJ addresses, inspection dates, and campaign message templates.

Expand Miles ALLOWED_TABLES to include company_info, service_types,
churn_settings, market_benchmarks. Enhance SQL agent prompt with
shop context from database.

Update frontend Customer type and components for first_name/last_name.
Add SQLite WAL files to .gitignore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(flyctl ssh console -a bolt-on-command-center -C "rm /app/data/command_center.db && echo ''DB deleted''")

Bash(cd D:/Bolt-On/Executive_Summary && echo "=== API routers ===" && ls node-backend/src/api/*.ts | sed 's/.*\\///' | sed 's/\\.ts$//' | sort && echo "" && echo "=== Test files ===" && ls node-backend/src/__tests__/*.test.ts | sed 's/.*\\///' | sed 's/\\.test\\.ts$//' | sort)
Bash(cd D:/Bolt-On/Executive_Summary && fly volumes create db_data --region ord --size 1 2>&1)

Bash(cd D:/Bolt-On/Executive_Summary/node-backend && npx tsx -e "
import { app } from './src/server.js'
import supertest from 'supertest'
const request = supertest\(app\)

const results = await Promise.all\([
  request.get\('/api/v1/campaigns'\),
  request.get\('/api/v1/campaigns/summary'\),
  request.get\('/api/v1/alerts?status=active'\),
  request.get\('/api/v1/status/kpis'\),
]\)
for \(const r of results\) {
  console.log\(r.req.path, '->', r.status, JSON.stringify\(r.body\).slice\(0, 200\)\)
}
process.exit\(0\)
" 2>&1)
